creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/docs/books/>

The in-page lists of articles and books can be deprecated. Instead, refer to: 

* <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/>
* <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/>

– use the same points of reference in <https://www.freebsd.org/docproj/doc-set/>. 

Postscript is probably no longer true. If true, it should be PostScript(R). 

Et cetera.
